nodes.label: YDC Portal Logo Icon
nodes.rationale: Brand logo icon of Youth Development Chapter (YDC) representing youth, volunteerism, and community collaboration with three stylized human figures (green, red, and blue) in a dynamic, outward-reaching circle.

nodes.label: YDC Colored Logo
nodes.rationale: Visual branding asset featuring stylized green, red, and blue human figures forming a circle alongside the black 'YDC' text representing Youth Development Chapter.

nodes.label: YDC Transparent Logo
nodes.rationale: Stylized visual logo for Youth Development Chapter showing three figures in green, blue, and red arranged in a circular design. Used as a watermark branding asset on volunteer dashboards, background overlays, and membership cards.
